title: TECHNICAL CROSS-SECTION
h1desc: Existing reinforced concrete structure, cleaned by high-pressure hydro-blasting (2500 bar) to open the capillaries.
h2desc: Active primer that penetrates deep into the concrete pores and crystallises on contact with moisture, blocking capillary rise.
h3desc: Primary structural layer reinforced with fibres. Withstands hydrostatic pressure up to 20 Bar (W20) and is watertight throughout its mass.
h4desc: Smooth surface membrane to reduce friction and increase hydraulic flow rate. Resistant to abrasion and chemicals.
